retrieved_result: User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions by Rich Teer, September 2007. Learn to use the conversation functions of the PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules) API and examine a sample program. Contents: Introduction, Conversation Functions, An Example Conversation Function.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses PAM authentication on Solaris OS and is unrelated to IDEs or software development environments, so it is not relevant to the query.
